Ensemble Kalman Filters  卡尔曼滤波器组¶

In [1]:  在[1]中：
%matplotlib inline
In [2]:  在[2]中：
#format the book
import book_format
book_format.set_style()
Out[2]:  Out[2]：

I am not well versed with Ensemble filters. I have implemented one for this book, and made it work, but I have not used one in real life. Different sources use slightly different forms of these equations. If I implement the equations given in the sources the filter does not work. It is possible that I am doing something wrong. However, in various places on the web I have seen comments by people stating that they do the kinds of things I have done in my filter to make it work. In short, I do not understand this topic well, but choose to present my lack of knowledge rather than to gloss over the subject. I hope to master this topic in the future and to author a more definitive chapter. At the end of the chapter I document my current confusion and questions. In any case if I got confused by the sources perhaps you also will, so documenting my confusion can help you avoid the same.
我对“集合滤波器”这一概念并不十分了解。为了本书的需要，我尝试实现了一个这样的滤波器，也确实让它能够正常工作。不过，在实际应用中，我从未使用过这种滤波器。不同的资料中，这些滤波器的实现方式略有不同。如果我按照其他资料中的公式来实现滤波器，那么滤波器就无法正常工作。很可能是我哪里做错了。不过，我在网上看到很多人也提到，他们采用了与我相同的做法来让滤波器正常工作。总的来说，我对这个主题了解得不够深入，但我选择坦诚地承认自己的不足，而不是试图掩饰它。我希望将来能掌握这个主题，并写出更详细的介绍。在本章的末尾，我记录下了自己目前的困惑和疑问。无论如何，如果我都被这些资料搞糊涂了，那么你也可能遇到同样的问题。因此，记录下我的困惑有助于你避免犯同样的错误。

The ensemble Kalman filter (EnKF) is very similar to the unscented Kalman filter (UKF) of the last chapter. If you recall, the UKF uses a set of deterministically chosen weighted sigma points passed through nonlinear state and measurement functions. After the sigma points are passed through the function, we find the mean and covariance of the points and use this as the filter's new mean and covariance. It is only an approximation of the true value, and thus suboptimal, but in practice the filter is highly accurate. It has the advantage of often producing more accurate estimates than the EKF does, and also does not require you to analytically derive the linearization of the state and measurement equations.
集合卡尔曼滤波器与上一章中介绍的无迹卡尔曼滤波器非常相似。如果你还记得的话，无迹卡尔曼滤波器使用了一组经过非线性状态和测量函数处理后的加权西格玛点。这些西格玛点经过处理后，我们会计算出它们的均值和协方差，然后以此作为滤波器的新均值和协方差。当然，这只是一个近似值，因此并非最优解。但实际上，该滤波器的精度相当高。它的优点在于，通常能比卡尔曼滤波器给出更准确的估计结果；同时，也不需要手动推导状态方程和测量方程的线性化表达式。

The ensemble Kalman filter works in a similar way, except it uses a Monte Carlo method to choose a large numbers of sigma points. It came about from the geophysical sciences as an answer for the very large states and systems needed to model things such as the ocean and atmosphere. There is an interesting article on it's development in weather modeling in SIAM News [1]. The filter starts by randomly generating a large number of points distributed about the filter's initial state. This distribution is proportional to the filter's covariance PP. In other words 68% of the points will be within one standard deviation of the mean, 95% percent within two standard deviations, and so on. Let's look at this in two dimensions. We will use numpy.random.multivariate_normal() function to randomly create points from a multivariate normal distribution drawn from the mean (5, 3) with the covariance
卡尔曼滤波器的工作原理类似，只不过它使用蒙特卡洛方法来选取大量的“西格玛点”。这一方法的起源可以追溯到地球物理学领域，为了解决模拟海洋、大气等系统时所面临的巨大状态和系统规模问题而发明。在《SIAM News》上有一篇关于该技术在天气预报中的应用的有趣文章[1]。该滤波器首先随机生成大量点，这些点分布在滤波器的初始状态周围。这些点的分布与滤波器的协方差有关。换句话说，68%的点会位于平均值的一个标准差范围内，95%的点会位于两个标准差范围内，依此类推。我们以二维情况来说明这一点。我们将使用 numpy.random.multivariate_normal() 函数，从均值为(5, 3)、协方差为……的多变量正态分布中随机生成点。

[32151540][32151540]

I've drawn the covariance ellipse representing two standard deviations to illustrate how the points are distributed.
我画出了表示两个标准差的协方差椭圆，以此来展示这些点的分布情况。

In [3]:  在[3]中：
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np
from numpy.random import multivariate_normal
from filterpy.stats import (covariance_ellipse, 
                            plot_covariance_ellipse)

mean = (5, 3)
P = np.array([[32, 15],
              [15., 40.]])

x,y = multivariate_normal(mean=mean, cov=P, size=2500).T
plt.scatter(x, y, alpha=0.3, marker='.')
plt.axis('equal')

plot_covariance_ellipse(mean=mean, cov=P,
                        variance=2.**2,
                        facecolor='none')

The Algorithm  该算法¶

As I already stated, when the filter is initialized a large number of sigma points are drawn from the initial state (xx) and covariance (PP). From there the algorithm proceeds very similarly to the UKF. During the prediction step the sigma points are passed through the state transition function, and then perturbed by adding a bit of noise to account for the process noise. During the update step the sigma points are translated into measurement space by passing them through the measurement function, they are perturbed by a small amount to account for the measurement noise. The Kalman gain is computed from the
正如我之前所说，当滤波器被初始化时，会从初始状态( xx )和协方差矩阵( PP )中随机选取大量西格玛点。之后的算法流程与 UKF 非常相似。在预测阶段，这些西格玛点会经过状态转换函数处理，同时会加入少量噪声以考虑过程中的随机误差。在更新阶段，西格玛点会经过测量函数转换到测量空间中，同样会加入少量噪声来弥补测量误差。卡尔曼增益则是根据相关公式计算得出的。

We already mentioned the main difference between the UKF and EnKF - the UKF choses the sigma points deterministically. There is another difference, implied by the algorithm above. With the UKF we generate new sigma points during each predict step, and after passing the points through the nonlinear function we reconstitute them into a mean and covariance by using the unscented transform. The EnKF keeps propagating the originally created sigma points; we only need to compute a mean and covariance as outputs for the filter!
我们之前已经提到了 UKF 和 EnKF 之间的主要区别：UKF 是以确定性方式来选择西格玛点的。上述算法还揭示了另一个区别：在 UKF 中，我们在每次预测时都会生成新的西格玛点；这些点经过非线性函数处理后，再通过无迹变换被转换成均值和协方差。而 EnKF 则继续使用最初生成的西格玛点；我们只需要计算出滤波后的均值和协方差即可。

Let's look at the equations for the filter. As usual, I will leave out the typical subscripts and superscripts; I am expressing an algorithm, not mathematical functions. Here NN is the number of sigma points, χχ is the set of sigma points.
让我们来看看该滤波器的计算公式。像往常一样，我会省略那些下标和上标；我这里描述的是算法，而非数学函数。其中， NN 表示西格玛点的数量， χχ 则代表西格玛点的集合。

Initialize Step  初始化步骤¶

χ∼N(x0,P0)χ∼N(x0,P0)

This says to select the sigma points from the filter's initial mean and covariance. In code this might look like
这意味着要从滤波器的初始均值和协方差中选取西格玛点。在代码中，可能表现为如下形式：

N = 1000
sigmas = multivariate_normal(mean=x, cov=P, size=N)

Predict Step  预测步骤¶

χx=f(χ,u)+vQ=1N∑1Nχχ=f(χ,u)+vQx=1N∑1Nχ

That is short and sweet, but perhaps not entirely clear. The first line passes all of the sigma points through a use supplied state transition function and then adds some noise distributed according to the QQ matrix. In Python we might write
这说法简短明了，但可能不太容易理解。第一行代码是将所有的西格玛点通过一个预先定义的状态转换函数进行处理，然后再根据 QQ 矩阵来添加一些噪声。在 Python 中，我们可以这样编写：

for i, s in enumerate(sigmas):
    sigmas[i] = fx(x=s, dt=0.1, u=0.)

sigmas += multivariate_normal(x, Q, N)

The second line computes the mean from the sigmas. In Python we will take advantage of numpy.mean to do this very concisely and quickly.
第二行代码用于计算各个“sigma”值的平均值。在 Python 中，我们可以利用 numpy.mean 这一语法来简洁高效地完成这一操作。

x = np.mean(sigmas, axis=0)

We can now optionally compute the covariance of the mean. The algorithm does not need to compute this value, but it is often useful for analysis. The equation is
我们现在可以选择性地计算均值的协方差。该算法并不一定非得计算这个值，但在进行分析时，这个数值往往很有用。其计算公式为：

P=1N−1∑1N[χ−x−][χ−x−]TP=1N−1∑1N[χ−x−][χ−x−]T

χ−x−χ−x− is a one dimensional vector, so we will use numpy.outer to compute the [χ−x−][χ−x−]T[χ−x−][χ−x−]T term. In Python we might write
χ−x−χ−x− 是一个一维向量，因此我们将使用 numpy.outer 来计算 [χ−x−][χ−x−]T[χ−x−][χ−x−]T 的值。在 Python 中，我们可以这样编写代码：

    P = 0
    for s in sigmas:
        P += outer(s-x, s-x)
    P = P / (N-1)

Update Step  更新步骤¶

In the update step we pass the sigma points through the measurement function, compute the mean and covariance of the sigma points, compute the Kalman gain from the covariance, and then update the Kalman state by scaling the residual by the Kalman gain. The equations are
在更新步骤中，我们将这些西格玛点代入测量函数中，计算出这些西格玛点的均值和协方差。接着，根据协方差来计算卡尔曼增益，最后通过用卡尔曼增益来调整残差值，从而更新卡尔曼状态。相关的公式如下：

χhzmeanPzzPxzKχxP=h(χ,u)=1N∑1Nχh=1N−1∑1N[χh−zmean][χh−zmean]T+R=1N−1∑1N[χ−x−][χh−zmean]T=PxzP−1zz=χ+K[z−χh+vR]=1N∑1Nχ=P−KPzzKTχh=h(χ,u)zmean=1N∑1NχhPzz=1N−1∑1N[χh−zmean][χh−zmean]T+RPxz=1N−1∑1N[χ−x−][χh−zmean]TK=PxzPzz−1χ=χ+K[z−χh+vR]x=1N∑1NχP=P−KPzzKT

This is very similar to the linear KF and the UKF. Let's just go line by line.
这与线性 KF 和 UKF 非常相似。我们逐行来分析吧。

The first line,  第一行，

χh=h(χ,u),χh=h(χ,u),

just passes the sigma points through the measurement function hh. We name the resulting points χhχh to distinguish them from the sigma points. In Python we could write this as
只是将西格玛点通过测量函数 hh 进行处理而已。我们将处理后的点称为 χhχh ，以便与西格玛点区分开来。在 Python 中，我们可以这样表示：

sigmas_h = h(sigmas, u)

The next line computes the mean of the measurement sigmas.
下一行代码用于计算各个测量值σ的平均值。

zmean=1N∑1Nχhzmean=1N∑1Nχh

In Python we write
在 Python 中，我们这样编写：

z_mean = np.mean(sigmas_h, axis=0)

Now that we have the mean of the measurement sigmas we can compute the covariance for every measurement sigma point, and the cross variance for the measurement sigma points vs the sigma points. That is expressed by these two equations
现在，既然我们已经知道了各个测量值σ的均值，那么就可以计算出每个测量点σ的协方差，以及各个测量点σ之间的交叉协方差。这些可以通过以下两个公式来表示。

PzzPxz=1N−1∑1N[χh−zmean][χh−zmean]T+R=1N−1∑1N[χ−x−][χh−zmean]TPzz=1N−1∑1N[χh−zmean][χh−zmean]T+RPxz=1N−1∑1N[χ−x−][χh−zmean]T

We can express this in Python with
我们可以用 Python 来表达这个公式。

P_zz = 0
for sigma in sigmas_h:
    s = sigma - z_mean
    P_zz += outer(s, s)
P_zz = P_zz / (N-1) + R

P_xz = 0
for i in range(N):
    P_xz += outer(self.sigmas[i] - self.x, sigmas_h[i] - z_mean)
P_xz /= N-1

Computation of the Kalman gain is straightforward K=PxzP−1zzK=PxzPzz−1.
卡尔曼增益的计算相当简单。

In Python this is
在 Python 中，是这样的。

K = P_xz @ inv(P_zz)

Next, we update the sigma points with
接下来，我们用新值来更新西格玛点。

χ=χ+K[z−χh+vR]χ=χ+K[z−χh+vR]

Here vRvR is the perturbation that we add to the sigmas. In Python we can implement this with
这里， vRvR 表示我们加到 sigma 值上的扰动量。在 Python 中，我们可以用以下方式来实现这一点：

v_r = multivariate_normal([0]*dim_z, R, N)
for i in range(N):
    sigmas[i] += K @ (z + v_r[i] - sigmas_h[i])

Our final step is recompute the filter's mean and covariance.
最后一步是重新计算该滤波器的均值和协方差。

    x = np.mean(sigmas, axis=0)
    P = self.P - K @ P_zz @ K.T

Implementation and Example
实施与示例¶

I have implemented an EnKF in the FilterPy library. It is in many ways a toy. Filtering with a large number of sigma points gives us very slow performance. Furthermore, there are many minor variations on the algorithm in the literature. I wrote this mostly because I was interested in learning a bit about the filter. I have not used it for a real world problem, and I can give no advice on using the filter for the large problems for which it is suited. Therefore I will refine my comments to implementing a very simple filter. I will use it to track an object in one dimension, and compare the output to a linear Kalman filter. This is a filter we have designed many times already in this book, so I will design it with little comment. Our state vector will be
我在 FilterPy 库中实现了 EnKF 算法。不过，从很多方面来看，这只是一个简单的实现而已。使用大量西格玛点进行滤波会导致处理速度极慢。此外，文献中还有许多该算法的细微变体。我编写这个代码主要是出于对这种滤波算法的好奇心。我并没有将其用于解决实际问题，因此也无法就如何将此算法应用于那些需要使用该算法的复杂问题给出建议。因此，我会把我的描述限制在实现一个非常简单的滤波器上。我会用它来跟踪一维空间中的物体，并将结果与线性卡尔曼滤波器的输出进行比较。这种滤波器是我们在这本书中已经多次使用过的，所以我会简单介绍一下其实现方式。我们的状态向量将是……

x=[xx˙]x=[xx˙]

The state transition function is
状态转换函数为

F=[1011]F=[1101]

and the measurement function is
而测量函数则是……

H=[10]H=[10]

The EnKF is designed for nonlinear problems, so instead of using matrices to implement the state transition and measurement functions you will need to supply Python functions. For this problem they can be written as:
EnKF 算法是为了解决非线性问题而设计的。因此，不需要使用矩阵来表示状态转换和测量函数，而是需要用 Python 函数来实现这些功能。对于这个问题，相应的 Python 函数可以这样编写：

def hx(x):
    return np.array([x[0]])

def fx(x, dt):
    return F @ x

One final thing: the EnKF code, like the UKF code, uses a single dimension for xx, not a two dimensional column matrix as used by the linear kalman filter code.
最后一点：与 UKF 算法类似，EnKF 算法也使用一维数组来表示 xx ，而不是像线性卡尔曼滤波算法那样使用二维矩阵来表示。

Without further ado, here is the code.
不用多说了，以下就是代码。

In [4]:  在[4]中：
import kf_book.book_plots as bp
from numpy.random import randn
from filterpy.kalman import EnsembleKalmanFilter as EnKF
from filterpy.kalman import KalmanFilter
from filterpy.common import Q_discrete_white_noise

np.random.seed(1234)

def hx(x):
    return np.array([x[0]])

def fx(x, dt):
    return F @ x
    
F = np.array([[1., 1.],[0., 1.]])

x = np.array([0., 1.])
P = np.eye(2) * 100.
enf = EnKF(x=x, P=P, dim_z=1, dt=1., N=20, hx=hx, fx=fx)

std_noise = 10.
enf.R *= std_noise**2
enf.Q = Q_discrete_white_noise(2, 1., .001)

kf = KalmanFilter(dim_x=2, dim_z=1)
kf.x = np.array([x]).T
kf.F = F.copy()
kf.P = P.copy()
kf.R = enf.R.copy()
kf.Q = enf.Q.copy()
kf.H = np.array([[1., 0.]])

measurements = []
results = []
ps = []
kf_results = []

zs = []
for t in range (0,100):
    # create measurement = t plus white noise
    z = t + randn()*std_noise
    zs.append(z)

    enf.predict()
    enf.update(np.asarray([z]))
    
    kf.predict()
    kf.update(np.asarray([[z]]))

    # save data
    results.append (enf.x[0])
    kf_results.append (kf.x[0,0])
    measurements.append(z)
    ps.append(3*(enf.P[0,0]**.5))

results = np.asarray(results)
ps = np.asarray(ps)

plt.plot(results, label='EnKF')
plt.plot(kf_results, label='KF', c='b', lw=2)
bp.plot_measurements(measurements)
plt.plot (results - ps, c='k',linestyle=':', lw=1, label='1$\sigma$')
plt.plot(results + ps, c='k', linestyle=':', lw=1)
plt.fill_between(range(100), results - ps, results + ps, facecolor='y', alpha=.3)
plt.legend(loc='best');

It can be a bit difficult to see, but the KF and EnKF start off slightly different, but soon converge to producing nearly the same values. The EnKF is a suboptimal filter, so it will not produce the optimal solution that the KF produces. However, I deliberately chose NN to be quite small (20) to guarantee that the EnKF output is quite suboptimal. If I chose a more reasonable number such as 2000 you would be unable to see the difference between the two filter outputs on this graph.
虽然有点难以察觉，但 KF 和 EnKF 在初始阶段的数值略有不同，但很快就会趋近于相同的数值。EnKF 是一种次优的滤波器，因此无法像 KF 那样得到最优解。不过，我故意将 NN 的值设得相当小（为 20），以确保 EnKF 的输出结果确实是次优的。如果我把这个数值设为 2000 左右，那么在这张图表上就很难分辨出两种滤波器输出结果之间的差异了。

Outstanding Questions  尚未解决的问题/仍有疑问的问题¶

All of this should be considered as my questions, not lingering questions in the literature. However, I am copying equations directly from well known sources in the field, and they do not address the discrepancies.
所有这些都应该被视为我自己的问题，而不是文献中已有的、悬而未决的问题。不过，我所引用的公式都是直接摘自该领域的权威来源的，而这些公式并没有解释那些不一致之处。

First, in Brown [2] we have all sums multiplied by 1N1N, as in
首先，在 Brown[2]中，所有的求和结果都乘以了 1N1N ，就像文中所述那样。

x^=1N∑i=1Nχ(i)kx^=1N∑i=1Nχk(i)

The same equation in Crassidis [3] reads (I'll use the same notation as in Brown, although Crassidis' is different)
在 Crassidis 的著作[3]中，同一个方程的表述如下（我会使用与 Brown 相同的符号表示法，不过 Crassidis 使用的符号有所不同）。

x^=1N−1∑i=1Nχ(i)kx^=1N−1∑i=1Nχk(i)

The same is true in both sources for the sums in the computation for the covariances. Crassidis, in the context of talking about the filter's covariance, states that N−1N−1 is used to ensure an unbiased estimate. Given the following standard equations for the mean and standard deviation (p.2 of Crassidis), this makes sense for the covariance.
在计算协方差时，这两个来源中的数值都是如此。Crassidis 在讨论滤波器的协方差时指出，使用 N−1N−1 是为了确保得到的估计结果是无偏的。根据 Crassidis 所给出的关于均值和标准差的标准公式（见第 2 页），这种处理方式在计算协方差时是合理的。

μσ2=1N∑i=1N[z~(ti)−z^(ti)]=1N−1∑i=1N{[z~(ti)−z^(ti)]−μ}2μ=1N∑i=1N[z~(ti)−z^(ti)]σ2=1N−1∑i=1N{[z~(ti)−z^(ti)]−μ}2

However, I see no justification or reason to use N−1N−1 to compute the mean. If I use N−1N−1 in the filter for the mean the filter does not converge and the state essentially follows the measurements without any filtering. However, I do see a reason to use it for the covariance as in Crassidis, in contrast to Brown. Again, I support my decision empirically - N−1N−1 works in the implementation of the filter, NN does not.
不过，我觉得没有理由使用 N−1N−1 来计算平均值。如果在计算平均值的滤波器中使用 N−1N−1 ，那么该滤波器将无法收敛，系统状态将完全取决于原始测量数据，而不会经过任何过滤处理。不过，我觉得可以像 Crassidis 所做的那样，将 N−1N−1 用于计算协方差，而 Brown 则持相反观点。我的决定是基于实证结果得出的：在滤波器的实现过程中， N−1N−1 是有效的，而 NN 则无效。

My second question relates to the use of the RR matrix. In Brown RR is added to PzzPzz whereas it isn't in Crassidis and other sources. I have read on the web notes by other implementers that adding R helps the filter, and it certainly seems reasonable and necessary to me, so this is what I do.
我的第二个问题与 RR 矩阵的使用有关。在 Brown 的著作中， RR 被加到了 PzzPzz 上，但在 Crassidis 及其他资料中则没有这样的处理方式。我在网上看到其他实现者的笔记，他们指出，加入 R 元素有助于提升过滤效果。在我看来，这种做法确实合理且必要，所以我也是这么做的。

My third question relates to the computation of the covariance PP. Again, we have different equations in Crassidis and Brown. I have chosen the implementation given in Brown as it seems to give me the behavior that I expect (convergence of PP over time) and it closely compares to the form in the linear KF. In contrast I find the equations in Crassidis do not seem to converge much.
我的第三个问题与协方差 PP 的计算方式有关。同样，Crassidis 和 Brown 给出的公式并不相同。我选择了 Brown 的公式，因为其计算结果符合我的预期（即 PP 会随着时间的推移而趋于稳定），而且其形式与线性 KF 算法中的公式很相似。相比之下，Crassidis 的公式似乎很难让计算结果趋于稳定。

My fourth question relates to the state estimate update. In Brown we have
我的第四个问题与状态估计的更新有关。在 Brown 的模型中，我们有……

χ=χ+K[z−zmean+vR]χ=χ+K[z−zmean+vR]

whereas in Crassidis we have
而在 Crassidis 中，情况则有所不同。

χ=χ+K[z−χh+vR]χ=χ+K[z−χh+vR]

To me the Crassidis equation seems logical, and it produces a filter that performs like the linear KF for linear problems, so that is the formulation that I have chosen.
在我看来，Crassidis 方程相当合理。它所生成的滤波器，其性能与用于线性问题的线性 KF 滤波器类似。因此，我选择了这种公式。

I am not comfortable saying either book is wrong; it is quite possible that I missed some point that makes each set of equations work. I can say that when I implemented them as written I did not get a filter that worked. I define "work" as performs essentially the same as the linear KF for linear problems. Between reading implementation notes on the web and reasoning about various issues I have chosen the implementation in this chapter, which does in fact seem to work correctly. I have yet to explore the significant amount of original literature that will likely definitively explain the discrepancies. I would like to leave this here in some form even if I do find an explanation that reconciles the various differences, as if I got confused by these books than probably others will as well.
我不敢断言这两本书中的哪一本是错的；很有可能是我忽略了某些能让这些方程组成立的要点。可以说，按照书中的描述来实现这些方程组时，我并没有得到一个能够正常工作的滤波器。我所说的“正常工作”，指的是其功能应与处理线性问题的线性 KF 算法基本相同。在阅读了网上的实现说明并仔细分析了各种问题之后，我选择了本章中所介绍的实现方式，而这种方式确实似乎能够正常工作。不过，我还需要进一步研究大量的原始文献，这些文献或许能最终解释这些差异。即便我找到了能解释这些差异的解释，我还是想把这里的内容保留下来。因为如果连我都被这些书搞糊涂了，那么其他人很可能也会如此。

References  参考文献¶

  • [1] Mackenzie, Dana. Ensemble Kalman Filters Bring Weather Models Up to Date Siam News, Volume 36, Number 8, October 2003. http://www.siam.org/pdf/news/362.pdf
    [1] 麦肯齐，达娜。《集合卡尔曼滤波器有助于使天气模型保持最新状态》，《Siam News》，第 36 卷，第 8 期，2003 年 10 月。http://www.siam.org/pdf/news/362.pdf

  • [2] Brown, Robert Grover, and Patrick Y.C. Hwang. Introduction to Random Signals and Applied Kalman Filtering, With MATLAB® excercises and solutions. Wiley, 2012.
    [2] 罗伯特·格罗弗·布朗、黄培基。《随机信号与卡尔曼滤波应用导论》，附 MATLAB®练习题及解答。威利出版社，2012 年。

  • [3] Crassidis, John L., and John L. Junkins. Optimal estimation of dynamic systems. CRC press, 2011.
    [3] Crassidis, John L.和 John L. Junkins. 动态系统的最优估计方法. CRC 出版社, 2011 年.
